INDEMNIFICATION AGREEMENT IS NOT SIGNED BY THE MOVING PARTY AND BY ITS OWN TERMS IS NOT INTENDED TO CONTRAVENE ANY OTHER AGREEMENTS (INCLUDING PURCHASE AGREEMENT) BY WHICH PARTIES ARE BOUND. THE ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT URBAN LAND PRESERVATION, LLC and JOHN ROWELL's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Completed is GRANTED, Purchase Agreement, the only agreement to which both remaining parties are signatories, contains an enforceable binding arbitration provision. Indemnification Agreement is not signed by the moving party and by its own terms is not intended to contravene any other agreements (including Purchase Agreement) by which parties are bound. The action is stayed pending arbitration. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
